title: Prima 11156C Whilstling Kettle 2.5Ltr. Metalic Black, Stainless Steel, 8 Cups
features: Generous 2.5 Litre Capacity: Ideal for boiling water for up to 8 cups, making it perfect for families or gatherings.
Classic Whistling Feature: Equipped with a traditional whistling function to alert you when the water is boiling, ensuring you never miss the perfect boil.
Durable Stainless Steel Construction: Made from high-quality stainless steel for long-lasting durability and resistance to rust and stains.
Sleek Metallic Black Finish: Features an elegant metallic black exterior that complements any kitchen decor with its modern and stylish appearance.
description: Product Description Elevate your kitchen with the PRIMA 11156C Whistling Kettle, a blend of functionality and style. With a generous 2.5-litre capacity, this kettle is perfect for boiling water for up to 8 cups, making it ideal for family meals or entertaining guests. The classic whistling feature alerts you when your water reaches a boil, ensuring you never miss the ideal temperature. Constructed from high-quality stainless steel, this kettle offers durability and resistance to rust and stains, ensuring it remains a staple in your kitchen for years to come. Its sleek metallic black finish adds a touch of modern elegance to your kitchen decor, while the ergonomic, heat-resistant handle provides safe and comfortable pouring. The PRIMA Whistling Kettle is compatible with all heat sources, including gas, electric, and induction stovetops, offering versatile use in any kitchen. Whether you’re boiling water for tea, coffee, or other hot beverages, the PRIMA 11156C Whistling Kettle combines practicality with a stylish design, making it a perfect addition to your home. Enjoy reliable performance and timeless design with this essential kitchen tool. Box Contains 1 x kettle
